positive: A sophisticated, symmetrical composition of bioluminescent celestial fauna and ethereal botanicals, forming a mandalic pattern. The central subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of glowing, ornate lilies and abstract star constellations. Use high contrast ink-wash style combined with neon glow effects. Color palette should be deep midnight blues, electric teals, ethereal lavenders, and pops of bright gold. The silhouette must be sharp and readable against a solid, subtly textured background. Intricate linework, sacred geometry elements, Art Nouveau influence, suitable for screen printing on dark fabrics. Minimalist yet detailed.
